creator: xelalex_maker@web.de
text:
Since about two weeks, I have problems with xfe on 10.1, because whenever a widget inside its windows gets highlighted because of the mouse-cursor touching it, the text inside disappears, leaving only the icons and the underlines for the Alt-shortcuts visible.

When I move the whole window by a few pixels, the text appears again, but the effect itself does not go away.

All programs in the xfe-suite seem to have this problem.

Even weirder: screenshots taken with scrot have all the text intact, although it is not present on screen!
